headline: Kimberly-Clark to Acquire Kenvue for $48.7 Billion
strategic_rationale: Creates a $32B global health and wellness leader combining Huggies, Kleenex, Band-Aid, Tylenol; $2.1B run-rate synergies expected
raw_snippet: Kimberly-Clark will acquire all outstanding shares of Kenvue common stock in a cash and stock transaction valued at approximately $48.7 billion enterprise value.

headline: KMB Kenvue merger creates global health giant worth $48bn
strategic_rationale: Combining Huggies, Kleenex, Band-Aid and Tylenol to strengthen higher-margin businesses
raw_snippet: Major consolidation through cooperation between Kimberly-Clark and Kenvue, combining brands such as Huggies, Kleenex, Band-Aid and Tylenol.

headline: Mars Acquires Kellanova in $36 Billion Snacking Mega-Deal
strategic_rationale: Creates global snacking powerhouse; stabilises Mars in high-scale category under consumer demand pressure
raw_snippet: The colossal $36bn acquisition of Kellanova by Mars focused on strengthening positions within existing snacking categories.

headline: European authorities approve Mars-Kellanova deal to form snacking giant
raw_snippet: European authorities have approved a USD 36 billion acquisition by Mars of Kellanova, aimed at creating a global snacking powerhouse.

headline: McCormick Acquires Unilever Food Business for $15.7 Billion
strategic_rationale: Transforms McCormick into global food giant; Unilever sheds non-core food to focus on beauty & home care
raw_snippet: McCormick announced a potential $44.8bn deal for Unilever's food business; IDNFinancials reported the final deal at USD 15.7 billion.

headline: PepsiCo Acquires Poppi Prebiotic Soda for $1.95 Billion
strategic_rationale: Accesses new operating model in DTC and prebiotic/functional beverages; includes $300M cash tax benefits
raw_snippet: PepsiCo paid $1.95bn for prebiotic soda brand Poppi including $300m of anticipated cash tax benefits, closing in May 2025.

headline: Ferrero Acquires WK Kellogg for $3.1 Billion
strategic_rationale: Consolidates breakfast/cereal category; leverages Ferrero's global distribution and brand building
raw_snippet: Ferrero's $3.1bn purchase of WK Kellogg has focused on strengthening positions within existing categories under margin pressure.

headline: Danone Acquires Huel Meal Replacement Brand for ~€1 Billion
strategic_rationale: Gains DTC subscription model and millennial/GenZ health brand; accesses digital-native revenue channel outside traditional retail
raw_snippet: Danone's agreement to acquire Huel at close to €1bn brings subscription-led, direct-to-consumer model into the group.

headline: Celsius Holdings Acquires Alani Nu for $1.8 Billion
strategic_rationale: Consolidates functional energy drink segment; combines female-skewed brands targeting wellness-oriented consumers
raw_snippet: Celsius's $1.8 billion purchase of Alani Nu signals that capital is flowing decisively towards better-for-you functional platforms.

headline: Hershey Acquires LesserEvil for Premium Snacking Bet
strategic_rationale: Enters premium, better-for-you snacking category to offset pressure on conventional candy; diversifies portfolio
raw_snippet: Hershey's acquisition of LesserEvil reflects a bet on premium, better-for-you snacking.

headline: Ingredion to Acquire Tate & Lyle in $3.6 Billion Deal
strategic_rationale: Combines two food ingredient giants to create leading B2B food solutions provider; expands specialty ingredients portfolio
raw_snippet: Ingredion to Take Over Tate & Lyle in $3.6 Billion Deal announced June 8, 2026.

headline: Keurig Dr Pepper Acquires JDE Peet's Coffee
strategic_rationale: Strengthens position in global coffee category; leverages Keurig's single-serve platform with JDE's international retail brands
raw_snippet: Keurig Dr Pepper's acquisition of JDE Peet's focused on strengthening positions within coffee category.

headline: Emami Acquires Remaining 49.6% Stake in The Man Company
strategic_rationale: Strengthens D2C presence with millennial-focused men's grooming brand; deepens digital/online channel capability
raw_snippet: Emami Limited acquired remaining 49.6% stake in Helios Lifestyle, parent of The Man Company, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.

headline: Froneri Valued at €15 Billion as PAI Partners Brings in ADIA as Minority Investor
strategic_rationale: PAI Partners restructures stake; ADIA signals sovereign wealth confidence in premium ice cream category at ~10-11x EBITDA multiple
raw_snippet: Froneri valued at approximately €15 billion including debt in October 2025, when PAI Partners restructured its stake and brought in ADIA as minority investor.

headline: Coca-Cola Shelves Costa Coffee Sale After PE Bids Fall Short
strategic_rationale: Originally acquired for £3.9B in 2018; PE bidders failed to meet Coca-Cola's price expectations in 2025 auction; sale shelved December 2025
raw_snippet: Coca-Cola launched auction for Costa Coffee in 2025 but private equity bidders failed to meet expectations, sale shelved December 2025.

headline: Pernod Ricard and Brown-Forman Merger Talks Collapse
strategic_rationale: Scale consolidation attempt in global spirits; collapsed due to valuation mismatch and structural complexity
raw_snippet: The collapse of Pernod Ricard and Brown-Forman talks reinforces that scale alone is not always sufficient to make transactions viable.
